summary.zh: 相关课程和论文工作展示了生物医学工程原理与设计的全面基础。
summary.en: Relevant coursework and thesis work demonstrate a comprehensive foundation in biomedical engineering principles and design.

title.zh: 基于等离子体处理的微流控平台仿生血管龛原型的制作
title.en: Prototyping of a Biomimetic Vascular Niche via Plasma Treatment in a Microfluidic Platform

body.zh: 详细设计、制造和实验验证用于细胞培养的微流控设备。应用先进的表面修饰技术，包括等离子体处理，以精确控制生物材料的亲水性和蛋白质粘附特性。开发功能原型以模拟生理血管龛，用于研究细胞-细胞和细胞-基质相互作用。
body.en: Detailed design, fabrication, and experimental validation of a microfluidic device for cell culture applications. Applied advanced surface modification techniques, including plasma treatment, to precisely control biomaterial hydrophilicity and protein adhesion properties. Developed a functional prototype to simulate a physiological vascular niche for studying cell-cell and cell-matrix interactions.
